results.title: ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter

results.title: Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter
results.snippet: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory.
